name: Risk Sentinel — USGS Seismic Data Ingestion

nodes.name: Schedule (Every 1h)
nodes.notes: Polls USGS earthquake feed every hour

nodes.name: USGS — Earthquakes M4.5+ (24h)
nodes.notes: Fetches all earthquakes magnitude ≥ 4.5 in the last 24 hours from USGS GeoJSON feed

nodes.name: Process & Score Trade Impact
nodes.notes: Enriches earthquakes with proximity to trade routes and nuclear test sites, computes trade impact score

nodes.name: Push to Risk Sentinel API
nodes.notes: Sends processed earthquake data to Risk Sentinel ingestion endpoint
